summary: Implemented the extension system's promptAppend hook: created extension-loader.mjs (scans .team/extensions/ dirs and validates manifests), extension-runner.mjs (invokes hooks with 5s timeout and circuit-breaker after 3 failures), and extension-registry.mjs (singleton that fans out capability calls). Modified run.mjs to call fireExtension('promptAppend') before dispatchToAgent() and append any returned strings to the agent brief.
